title: Expense DB-iteration loops swallow mid-stream errors — under-reported totals / truncated tax-export CSV returned as HTTP 200

executionHistory.note: Created the bug artifact set, hardened all 11 expense row-iteration loops to the repo's established rows.Err() convention, extracted three testable rowScanner helpers in internal/api/expenses.go (mirroring internal/list), and added an adversarial regression suite with a captured RED-on-reintroduction proof. Direct implementation per agent contract (no sub-agent dispatch available in this invocation).

unresolvedFindings.dodRef: scopes.md Scope 1 DoD — Consolidated commit of the spec-034 code change + parent recertification
unresolvedFindings.acceptanceCriteria: At the end-of-sweep bubbles.devops pass, commit the BUG-034-004 fix together with the other R10 sweep changes, run the full validation surface (check + lint + test unit/integration), and recertify specs/034-expense-tracking. The certified parent's commit-state gate (G088/Check 17) is expected to be dirty until this consolidated commit lands; it MUST NOT be force-passed in this bug packet.
unresolvedFindings.note: Engineering fix + adversarial regression are complete and green in-process (see report.md). Commit + recert deferred to the consolidated sweep pass per the R10 sweep contract.

routing.reason: Engineering fix shipped and proven in-process: all 11 expense row-iteration loops hardened to the repo's established rows.Err() convention, 3 testable rowScanner helpers extracted (internal/api/expenses.go), and an 8-test adversarial regression suite green with a captured RED-on-reintroduction proof (report.md). The single open item — consolidated commit of the certified spec-034 code change + parent recertification — is deferred to the end-of-sweep bubbles.devops pass per the R10 stochastic-quality-sweep contract and recorded as non-blocking unresolvedFinding BUG-034-004-COMMIT-001. Parent spec 034 state.json/certification were NOT modified by this packet.
